mapper.select: SELECT ff.id, ff.user_id, ff.folder_name, ff.description, ff.cover_image, ff.is_default, ff.is_private, ff.sort_order, ff.item_count, ff.create_time, ff.update_time, COUNT(f.id) as favoriteCount FROM favorite_folder ff LEFT JOIN favorite f ON ff.id = f.folder_id WHERE ff.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ff.id, ff.user_id, ff.folder_name, ff.description, ff.cover_image, ff.is_default, ff.is_private, ff.sort_order, ff.item_count, ff.create_time, ff.update_time ORDER BY ff.sort_order
